review_must_fix: Provider communication exceptions could propagate as full dashboard API 503 failures.
review_should_consider: Reduce provider HTTP timeout from 8 seconds to the 3-5 second range.
Use N/A instead of fixed Stooq CSV source for unavailable items.

implemented: Isolated Stooq and Frankfurter provider exceptions in MarketService.
Returned empty quote maps for failed providers so healthy provider data can still be used.
Preserved stale cache fallback when a refresh produces an entirely unavailable summary.
Reduced Stooq and Frankfurter default timeouts to 4 seconds.
Changed unavailable item source to N/A.
Added provider exception and timeout regression tests.
risks: Free external data providers can still be delayed, temporarily unavailable, or change symbol support.
future_improvements: Record the KOSDAQ/KOSPI 200 exclusion rationale in a later documentation stage if allowed.
Consider an optional non-interactive-safe pause mode for batch-file UX if needed.
decisions: Accepted review must_fix and should_consider items under defaults_mode.
Rejected unconditional start-dashboard.bat pause because it can block automated non-interactive runs.
Deferred 02_dev.md documentation edit because it is forbidden in this stage.
Recorded model_mismatch=true because the preferred model was Claude and the actual model was Codex.
